attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 WRPCE.BK_EXCEPTION_ID_INT, 
WRPCE.FLOW_TYPE, 
WRPCE.DF_OR_FLB_TYPE, 
WRPCE.RETRO_INVOICE_STATUS_CD, 
WRPCE.RETRO_USD_AMT, 
WRPCE.SHIPPED_QTY,
WRPCE.LAST_UPDATE_DTM, 
WRPCE.INVENTORY_ITEM_USD_COST,
 WRPCE.ORIGINAL_EXCEPTION_TYPE_CD,
  WRPCE.EXCEPTION_TYPE_CD, 
  WRPCE.EXCEPTION_STATUS_CD, 
  WRPCE.CREATION_DTM, 
  WRPCE.MAJOR_PRODUCT_KEY, 
  WRPCE.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY, 
  WRPCE.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
  WRPCE.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY, 
  WRPCE.RETRO_INVOICE_LINE_KEY, 
  WRPCE.RU_SHIPMENT_DTM, 
  WRPCE.RU_SHIPMENT_NUM, 
  WRPCE.RU_RECEIVED_DTM, 
  WRPCE.RU_RESOLVED_FLB_USD_COST,
   WRPCE.RU_FLB_QTY, 
   WRPCE.RU_FLB_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
    WRPCE.RU_FLB_ITEM_KEY, 
    WRPCE.RU_DRCT_FULFILMNT_FEE_USD_COST, 
    WRPCE.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
    WRPCE.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
    WRPCE.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
    WRPCE.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
    WRPCE.DV_RESOLUTION_DT,
    WRPCE.RESOLUTION_DTM,
    WRPCE.REASON_CD,
    WRPCE.INITIAL_REASON_CD,
/* priyavij: 11/08/2015 added as a part of September QWIN retro Overhaul */
    WRPCE.RECEIPT_NUM,
    WRPCE.RSLVD_DRCT_FULFLMT_FEE_USD_AMT,
    WRPCE.ADVNC_SHPMT_NOTICE_CREATE_DT,
    WRPCE.RU_FWD_REF_EXCEPTION_ID_INT
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_RETRO_PAYMENT_COST_EXCEPTION WRPCE
WHERE WRPCE.DML_TYPE='I'
